title: Another casual $42,688 day… nothing special?
author: Zealousideal-Hat4801
selftext:
Just another day in the market I guess

Up **$42,688 (+6.45%) today** on a \~$700K account

Not even my best day, which is kinda crazy to say

Still trying to figure out if I actually know what I’m doing… or just riding momentum

My friends and I have compiled a set of strategies and methods for analyzing market trends, and we have shared them in my group. If you are interested, please leave a comment or contact me directly. I hope to do my utmost to assist those who can truly benefit from these guidelines

comments.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
comments.body:
I have built an ML trading system for BTC and Gold that I genuinely trust. 5 years backtested, averaging around 10% per month on fixed lot, Sharpe above 3.

Been live trading it since September, and the model stayed positive through the entire spot drawdown. That part I'm most proud of honestly.

I don't have the capital to scale it myself so I'm looking for someone serious who would acquire it. Full backtest report here: [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xwNisxVslkfPPY9g2rcbWt4shrI-9o4-/view?usp=drive\_link](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xwNisxVslkfPPY9g2rcbWt4shrI-9o4-/view?usp=drive_link)

If it looks interesting to someone, drop a comment or reach out, happy to have a straightforward conversation. Also will be providing the live trade data if anyone really interested in my profitable system.

comments.author: Forsaken_Leader_8
comments.body:
Those are solid numbers for a $700k account, but a 6% swing in one day usually means you are taking on some serious risk or riding a very specific volatility spike. For most people here, trying to follow a "secret group" strategy usually leads to a blown account because the risk management isn't there.

If you actually want to understand how AI finds these momentum moves without the "trust me bro" factor of a private group, check out signalwhisper.com. It is a public platform that shows the data and the signals clearly so you can actually learn the logic instead of just following DMs.
